description:
Create a Project record in iDempiere to track a capital improvement for the "Warehouse Renovation 2024" (Search Key: WH-RENO-2024).

Header Details:
- Organization: HQ
- Description: Complete renovation of main warehouse facility including structural upgrades and improved loading dock
- Date Contract: 2024-07-01
- Planned Finish Date: 2025-01-31
- Planned Amount: 250,000.00
- Currency: USD

Include the following project phases:
- Seq 10: Planning and Design | Planned Amt: 25,000 | Start: 2024-07-01 | End: 2024-08-15
- Seq 20: Demolition and Site Prep | Planned Amt: 45,000 | Start: 2024-08-16 | End: 2024-09-30
- Seq 30: Construction and Installation | Planned Amt: 150,000 | Start: 2024-10-01 | End: 2024-12-15
- Seq 40: Final Inspection and Handover | Planned Amt: 30,000 | Start: 2024-12-16 | End: 2025-01-31
